map: DOCUMENTED: circular dark-RED arena with a brown-brick ring border, a WATER moat around it, and torches along the edge. Minimap shows a circular MULTI-COLORED dungeon layout (fitting the 'gelatinous' colored-slime theme). Gelatinous Palace = a ROTF dungeon by designer Foucs (named in the Riverside Refuge dev blog).

bosses.name: Gelatinous Crusader (Yellow)
